turns.user_message: I've realized I'm just not a good person lately. It feels like I'm always doing something wrong.
I keep noticing how my actions hurt people, even when I try not to. It's becoming a pattern I can't break.
I think my core is just flawed and selfish. Every good intention I have ends up causing more harm.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves. This just started recently.
